emails.subject: Re: Carnegie Interviews Super Friday
emails.body: Kristin, I shall be tied up with the Wharton group all day Friday. I am forwarding the message to some members of the Research Group. I hope some of them will be available. Vince P.S. To the Research Group. Can you, please, help Kristin? Enron North America Corp. From: Kristin Gandy ENRON 01/16/2001 02:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: Carnegie Interviews Super Friday
emails.body: Vince, Thank you very much but I ended up finding interviewers for all the time slots. Paulo has volunteered to interview for 1 hour, thank you for suggesting his name. Kristin Vince J Kaminski@ECT 01/17/2001 02:00 PM
